text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, before the autumn Tenno Sho, Vodka
and Daiwa Scarlet have a talk at the planetarium.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet has continued to walk on her path,
carefully connecting the lines in her
predetermined constellation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Vodka unconventionally
focuses on the individual stars, unbothered by the
big picture.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sparks fly between their two opposing
constellations as they look towards the big race.
